metadata.title: CalmExchange
metadata.description: Meditation exchange — public catalog and personal dashboard

home.subtitle: Meditation exchange
home.heroSubtitle: Discover practices from the community, like what resonates, and share your own in a calm, respectful space.
home.recentEmptyHint: Be the first — sign in and publish a meditation

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.subtitle: All public meditations from the community
catalog.emptyHint: Public meditations will appear when members start sharing

meditationPage.readOnlyHint: View only — editing is available in your dashboard

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.s1Body: CalmExchange ("Service") processes personal data under GDPR (EU 2016/679). Contact: support@calmexchange.app.
privacy.s2Body: Google sign-in: email, name, profile photo, OAuth ID. Usage: meditation texts, likes, language settings, session cookies.
privacy.s3Body: Providing the Service (contract). Google OAuth (consent). Auto-translation via MyMemory — only with your explicit opt-in.
privacy.s4Body: Google (OAuth), Vercel (hosting), Neon (PostgreSQL), MyMemory (translation — opt-in only). Data may be processed outside the EU with appropriate safeguards.
privacy.s5Body: Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection. Export and delete account in Settings. You may lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority.
privacy.s6Body: Data kept while your account is active. Deleted on account removal. JWT session up to 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.s1Body: CalmExchange lets you create, store, and share meditation texts. By using the Service you accept these terms.
terms.s2Body: Sign in with Google. You are responsible for published content and third-party rights.
terms.s3Body: Public meditations are visible to others. Do not publish third parties' personal data without consent.
terms.s4Body: You may delete your account in Settings. We may restrict access for violations.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie policy
cookiesPage.s1Body: Auth.js session — required for sign-in and security.
cookiesPage.s2Body: NEXT_LOCALE — UI language. AUTO_TRANSLATE — consent for MyMemory auto-translation. Set only when you accept all or enable in Settings.
cookiesPage.s3Body: A banner appears on first visit. Choose essential only or accept all. COOKIE_CONSENT is stored for 1 year.

contacts.title: Contact
contacts.body:
CalmExchange and GDPR inquiries:

Email: support@calmexchange.app

Replace with a real address before production.

cookies.bannerBody: Essential cookies for sign-in. Optional: UI language and meditation auto-translation (third-party MyMemory).

gdpr.dataDescription: Download a copy of all data linked to your account (JSON).
gdpr.autoTranslateDescription: Allow sending meditation text to MyMemory for translation. Without consent, original language is shown.
gdpr.deleteDescription: Permanently deletes your account, meditations, likes, and translations.
gdpr.deleteConfirmDescription: This cannot be undone. All your data will be removed.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in with Google to manage your meditations.
auth.consentSuffix: and agree to data processing for Google sign-in.

errors.Configuration: Auth.js configuration error. Check /api/auth/check-config and Vercel environment variables.
errors.AccessDenied: Access denied by Google. Add your email to Test users in Google Cloud Console.
errors.OAuthSignin: Could not start OAuth. Check GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.
errors.OAuthCreateAccount: Could not create user. Check DATABASE_URL and migrations.
errors.Default: Sign in failed. Please try again.

mine.subtitle: My meditations
mine.emptyHint: Create your first one — click «+ New meditation»

public.subtitle: Public meditations
public.emptyHint: Create a meditation in «My meditations», enable «Public» — it will appear here and others can like it 👍

meditationForm.editDescription: Change the title, content, or visibility.
meditationForm.createDescription: Create a meditation for personal use or publication.
meditationForm.publicHint: Visible to everyone on the «Public» tab

settings.subtitle: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose the interface language. Meditation translations — in Privacy settings below.

history.subtitle: History
history.comingSoonDescription: Your listening history and recently opened meditations will appear here.

errors.notFoundOrForbidden: Meditation not found or access denied
